# CWE-1392 negative: admin password from secret env var (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-1392-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

// CWE-1392 mitigated: initial admin password loaded from environment, not a default literal.

import (
	"crypto/sha256"
	"encoding/hex"
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"sync"
)

type AdminUserSafePure struct {
	Username string
	Password string
}

var adminSafeMu sync.Mutex
var adminUserSafePure AdminUserSafePure

func BootstrapAdminSafePure() http.HandlerFunc {
	return func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		secret := os.Getenv("BOOTSTRAP_ADMIN_PASSWORD")
		if secret == "" {
			http.Error(w, "bootstrap password not configured", http.StatusServiceUnavailable)
			return
		}
		sum := sha256.Sum256([]byte(secret))
		hash := hex.EncodeToString(sum[:])
		adminSafeMu.Lock()
		adminUserSafePure = AdminUserSafePure{Username: "admin", Password: hash}
		adminSafeMu.Unlock()
		w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
		w.Write([]byte(`{"admin_ready":true}`))
	}
}
